optionset.Name: cr950_datasource
optionset.description: Tracks data origin for audit trail across all system tables

Description.description: Tracks data origin for audit trail across all system tables
Excel Estimator
Manual Entry
Modified After Import
Future API Integrations
Future Legacy Migration

optionset.Name: cr950_revenuestatus
optionset.description: Revenue recognition lifecycle state (AUTO-POPULATED by Power Automate)

Description.description: Revenue recognition lifecycle state (AUTO-POPULATED by Power Automate)
Awaiting apparatus completion
Revenue recognized, hours locked
Manual adjustment made by Finance
Revenue voided (apparatus re-opened or errors)
